name: Teachable
tagline: Create and sell online courses and coaching
description: Teachable is a platform for creators, coaches, and educators to build and sell online courses, coaching programmes, and digital downloads. It handles hosting, payments, student management, and certificates — no technical setup required.
pros: Easy to build and sell courses
cons: Basic plan relatively expensive for what you get
use_cases: You're a creator or coach launching your first paid course and want video hosting, payments, and student management handled without technical setup
You want to monetise your expertise through drip-content courses, digital downloads, and coaching packages all in one storefront
Your course business is growing and you need an affiliate programme to let students refer others and earn commissions
You want to offer completion certificates and quizzes to increase student engagement and course completion rates
